Video.summary: In part 2 of the British episodes, Andy visits the majestic land of Scotland. Here he is introduced to Scottish deer stalking, a type of hunting that is full of history and etiquette. He hunts ‘monarch’ stags and goes into the Atlantic waters to find some of the freshest shellfish on the planet which he, and Mike Robinson cook and eat. Concluding the British episodes in a place as wild as Scotland really sets the tone for the series.
Video.title: Wildbound - "UK Part 2"

Video.summary: Mike Pentecost sets up a new stand on a creek crossing in Illinois that had been scouted for the past two years. It always heated up as the season progressed, and on his very first morning sit, the action unfolded fast. A good buck came cruising from the South in search of a doe. At 60 yards he started to turn away, but the Intimidator grunt call changed everything. With a few calls from the Intimidator, he spun around from 150 yards, worked a scrape at 40 yards, and walked right into range!
Video.title: "Right Spot, Right Time"

Video.summary: We highlight organizations and programs making a difference in the Florida Keys. Learn how they help protect and restore these vital ecosystems.
Video.title: "Groups working to restore our vital ecosystems"

Image.alt: "Groups working to restore our vital ecosystems"
"Groups working to restore our vital ecosystems"
"Groups working to restore our vital ecosystems"

Video.summary: After a tough week of hunting in Ohio, Chancey Holdsworth of Buckventures, heads to the Southern Illinois hardwoods where the bucks are on the move. From close encounters to a couple of mishaps, the action builds until Chancey comes face to face with a mature Illinois buck!
Video.title: "The Highs & Lows of Bowhunting"

Video.summary: On this episode we travel to Rock Falls Raceway in Wisconsin to highlight our nations heroes who have made drag racing and serving our country a way of life! We also honor our next Fargo Scheels Hometown hero, Elizabeth Miller.
Video.title: "Zenzen Racing"

Video.summary: Captain Mike travels to the "Forgotten Coast" to fish Keaton Beach for the first time with the legendary Captain Greg DeVault.
Video.title: "Forgotten Coast"

Video.summary: Kyle and Jeff venture deep into Maine’s backcountry with their buddy Chuck, ice fishing remote lakes only reachable by snowmobile. Their journey ends at the legendary “ghost trains,” a pair of abandoned locomotives that now rest as silent monuments to a forgotten logging era.
Video.title: "The Maine Ghost Trains"

Video.summary: Capt Josh and Johnny from Johnny Jigs head out with gorgeous weather on their side to hit some reefs and put the jigs to work!
Video.title: "Johnny Jigs"

Video.summary: In Missouri, we join Avery Epperson on the home farm with one goal in mind—catching up with a legendary buck known as Old Monroe. It doesn’t take long before the hunt heats up as the crew spots their target and works to grunt him into bow range. Hunting over a lush green plot on the home farm, Avery gets the chance every whitetail hunter dreams of.
Video.title: "Old Monroe"

Video.summary: On this episode, we travel north of the border for an unforgettable PART 1 Canadian fly-in fishing trip with Mandatory Fun Outdoors. We also highlight our next Scheels Hometown Hero, Jay Strande!
Video.title: "Canadian Fly-In With Mandatory Fun "Part 1""

Video.summary: An Honor No One Wants: A Gold Star Family is the immediate family member(s) of a fallen soldier who died while serving in a time of conflict. Ginger Gilbert-Ravella honors the memory her husband…American hero Troy Gilbert.
Video.title: "Ginger Gilbert-Ravella"

Video.summary: U.S. Marines combat correspondent Ken Plant tells of being captured and tortured as a POW.
Video.title: "Ken Plant"

Video.summary: Jacob Pentecost and Easton Thompson head to Illinois for the youth hunting season. With hot weather and slow deer movement, the hunt proves to be a challenge. After days of patience and persistence, Jacob finally gets the opportunity to fill his tag!
Video.title: "Slow Start, Big Finish!"

Video.summary: After purchasing his very first Kansas farm, Shawn and his good friend Cole set out to transform it into a true whitetail paradise. Years of hard work, dedication, and habitat improvement finally pay off when Shawn takes on a challenge he’s never faced before—harvesting a whitetail buck on the ground with no blind! Filming adds another layer of difficulty, but the reward is more than worth it. In an unforgettable hunt, Shawn is able to harvest a giant 9.5-year-old Kansas buck, making this a once-in-a-lifetime experience.
Video.title: "Chasing Kansas Giants"

Video.summary: Young Captain Reed Tudor hosts Captain Mike in Duck Key, FL and puts him on Micro Tarpon, Redfish and Goliath Grouper.
Video.title: "Anything and Everything"

Video.summary: Josh takes his friend Isaiah to the blue water as they look for destin's latest hot bite, the blackfin tuna.
Video.title: "Tuna Tataki"

Video.summary: Josh and George from Two Georges Marina battle the wind and tide on a tough day of fishing which leads Josh to fish another day, solely for revenge on the Sheepshead!
Video.title: "Two Georges Marina"

Video.summary: Join Captain Josh and Sheriff Eric Aden for a day of fishing and fun in Destin, Florida. These two friends hit the water, catching fish both offshore and inshore, and reeling in some impressive catches. With plenty of laughs, great stories, and a few surprises along the way, this episode is all about the joy of fishing and the bond between two guys who love the sea.
Video.title: "Hook, Line & Sheriff"

Video.summary: Join the Mayor of Destin as he ventures into the world of coastal fishing, leaving the city behind for a day of fun and unexpected challenges. With plenty of laughs and surprising twists, this episode showcases the Mayor in a whole new light.
Video.title: "Reel Politics"

Video.summary: Captain Josh and the fam head out to do some surf fishing to see what’s biting. Then ended the day building professional sand castles and playing goofy golf.
Video.title: "Family Fun"

Video.summary: CA heads to Rockport TX. Despite fierce weather patterns, he strikes copper.
Video.title: "Rockport Roundup"

Video.summary: After a year of foul weather and tough conditions, CA aims to end his season with a bang in Louisiana.
Video.title: "The Last Stand"

Video.summary: In this episode of Flats Class TV Captain C.A. is fishing in Louisiana for Bull Reds.
Video.title: "Marsh Madness"

Video.summary: Captain Jonathan Moss is in Columbia, South Carolina, fishing with Captain Justin McGrady for the elusive freshwater Striped Bass.
Video.title: "Reelin' Rapids"

Video.summary: Captains Jonathan Moss and Josh Greer are fishing for south Florida’s exotics amongst the alligators of the Florida Everglades.
Video.title: "Alligator Alley"

Video.summary: Captain Jonathan Moss shares the skiff with the creator of D.O.A. Lures, Capt. Mark Nichols, in Stuart, Florida.
Video.title: “Mr. D.O.A.”

Video.summary: Captain Jonathan Moss is fishing one of his favorite Central Florida Lakes for Largemouth Bass!
Video.title: “Notorious L.M.B..”

Video.summary: Welcome to The Fly Shop Tour! In September of 2022, we set across the Rocky Mountains on a 2500 Mile Road Trip visiting & fishing with local Fly Shops. Our Mission? To highlight small businesses that drive the sport we love: Fly Fishing! Along the way, we got a chance to host meetups in every state - all with the goal to raise money for local conservation organizations & meet some of our fans. Follow us as we tell the story of 12 unique fly shops, fish the waters surrounding their area, and make our way throughout the Rocky Mountains.
Video.title: "Our 2500 Mile ROAD TRIP Begins"

Video.summary: The Flylords team heads to Wyoming for an unforgettable adventure. Join them as they explore incredible fly-fishing opportunities and learn about the passionate folks behind Two Rivers Fishing Co. and Worldcast Anglers. Along the way, they share stories, fish some of Wyoming's best waters, and meet the dedicated guides who call this place home. The team also participates in a special event at Roadhouse Brewing Co., raising money for Jackson Hole Trout Unlimited to help conserve and protect local trout populations.
Video.title: "Hungry Trout in Crystal CLEAR Water"

Video.summary: Join Dan Cabela as he travels across Argentina to see how scientists and hunters are working together. From region-wide bird surveys to the incredible conservation work being done on the critically endangered huemul deer, this beautiful country has no shortage of fascinating stories.
Video.title: "Conservation in La Albiceleste"

Video.summary: Human encroachment and pressure from poaching are the greatest threats to wildlife in Africa. Dan Cabela has traveled to Tanzania to see how Robin Hurt safaris manages two large conservation areas in the face of these daily challenges.
Video.title: "Anti-poaching in Tanzania"

Video.summary: Texas turkey hunting doesn’t disappoint in this action-packed TURKEY POSSE episode. Will Cooper and his buddy Matthew Itz get it done on some fired-up Rio Grandes, with Will even doubling up on a solo mission when opportunity strikes. But the best moment comes when Matthew and Will take Matthew’s son into the field for his very first turkey hunt. From wide eyes in the blind to watching his dad bag a big tom, it’s a full-circle hunt that’s about more than just punching tags — it’s about passing it on. Rio's gobbling, close encounters, and memories that’ll last a lifetime… this one has it all.
Video.title: "Texas Turkey Hunting: Rios Down & First Hunt Memories"

Image.alt: "Texas Turkey Hunting: Rios Down & First Hunt Memories"
"Texas Turkey Hunting: Rios Down & First Hunt Memories"
"Texas Turkey Hunting: Rios Down & First Hunt Memories"

Video.summary: Kyle and Jeff join a local biologist searching for a white rhino whose tracking collar has failed, leaving it exposed to poachers. As they follow its trail through the African bush, the search builds toward a heart-pounding encounter that none of them will ever forget.
Video.title: "Africa Part 3"

Video.summary: Kyle and Jeff wade into the flooded timber of the legendary Coca-Cola Woods, where mallards drop through the treetops in waves. Amidst echoes of calling and wingbeats, they experience one of America’s most iconic duck hunts.
Video.title: "The Coca-Cola Woods"

Video.summary: Kyle and Jeff scour the rugged mountains of southern Arizona in search of the elusive Coues deer, known to hunters as the “Grey Ghost.” Through scorching sun and shifting winds, they test their skill and patience chasing one of North America’s most elusive big game animals.
Video.title: "Arizona Coues Deer"

Video.summary: The Green Way team continue their African journey with hunts for both the majestic Kudu and elusive Golden Wildebeest. The experience comes full circle when the meat from these animals is donated to local schoolchildren, who receive not only fresh meals but also school supplies and sweets that light up the village.
Video.title: "Africa Part 2"

Video.summary: In this episode, Mark Peterson finds himself deep in the heart of Peru and focuses on completing the prestigious South America Upland Slam. With only one bird remaining, the Western Peruvian Dove, the trip has led him to a private hunting property. This final challenge will take place over a cut cornfield, a favorite spot for the doves. To blend in, Mark and his team craft a makeshift blind using a mix of corn stalks, and timber, just enough cover while allowing for a clear shot. These West Peruvian Doves are known for their erratic flight patterns, often bouncing from one tree to another in a random manner, making timing and placement critical.
Video.title: "South America Upland Slam - Peru Part 2"

Video.summary: The hunt for FREAK SHOW became a thrilling adventure after I spotted him on Cabela’s trail cam. Having hunted Kentucky for over a decade and established my own properties—Bootleggers Ridge and Stonewall Plantation—I was eager for the chance at such a remarkable deer. Despite having drawn a coveted caribou tag through Worldwide Trophy Adventures’ TAGS Program, the allure of FREAK SHOW was too strong to resist. After careful planning and waiting for the right wind, I finally - set out on September 11. With my crossbow in hand, I waited anxiously in the stand, my heart racing as the shadows lengthened. Just when I thought the evening might end without a sighting, a movement caught my eye, sending my pulse soaring. With caution, FREAK SHOW appeared.
Video.title: "Freak Show - Largest Buck I’ve Ever Encountered"

Image.alt: "Freak Show - Largest Buck I’ve Ever Encountered"
"Freak Show - Largest Buck I’ve Ever Encountered"
"Freak Show - Largest Buck I’ve Ever Encountered"

Video.summary: Continuing on with his quest for The North America Deer Slam, Mark Peterson packs his Gunwerks Nexus 300 PRC rifle for a hunt in Mexico targeting the elusive Mexican Texanus Whitetail from elevated blinds. The outfitter here has done an amazing job managing the deer numbers and age groups to grow giant whitetails. Mark is anticipating the pre-rut will get these big bucks moving.
Video.title: "North American Deer Slam - Mexican Texanus Whitetail"

Image.alt: "North American Deer Slam - Mexican Texanus Whitetail"
"North American Deer Slam - Mexican Texanus Whitetail"
"North American Deer Slam - Mexican Texanus Whitetail"

Video.summary: Mark Peterson continues his hunt in Mexico for a Mexican Texanus Whitetail. On day one, Mark connected with a great management buck, making this buck the first Mexican Texanus Whitetail with his rifle. As temperatures drop and bucks become more active each passing day, he eagerly anticipates an action-packed evening ahead.
Video.title: "North American Deer Slam - Giant Mexican Texanus Whitetail"

Image.alt: "North American Deer Slam - Giant Mexican Texanus Whitetail"
"North American Deer Slam - Giant Mexican Texanus Whitetail"
"North American Deer Slam - Giant Mexican Texanus Whitetail"

Video.summary: In our final episode in Japan, the DIRT team went road-tripping through beautiful, snowy Japanese landscapes—and tasting everything in sight. A crown jewel in the northeast corner of Japan, Hokkaido may be famous among skiers and snowboarders for the luscious "Japow," but way beyond the tourist trail there's a burgeoning new food scene and a unique and vibrant history. Though, if we're honest, Josh probably could've spent the whole trip carving up the mountain and been a happy camper.
Video.title: DIRT - "Tasting Hokkaido's Secret Food Scene & Exploring Japan’s Snow Capital | DIRT Japan: Hokkaido"

Image.alt: DIRT - "Tasting Hokkaido's Secret Food Scene & Exploring Japan’s Snow Capital | DIRT Japan: Hokkaido"
DIRT - "Tasting Hokkaido's Secret Food Scene & Exploring Japan’s Snow Capital | DIRT Japan: Hokkaido"
DIRT - "Tasting Hokkaido's Secret Food Scene & Exploring Japan’s Snow Capital | DIRT Japan: Hokkaido"

Video.summary: During this episode of Ship Shape TV Essentials the SSTV team is at - John’s lake house on Tupper Lake, NY. They are checking out some of the damage done to John’s pontoon decking from freezing weather they received. John and the team are upgrading the material, and adding carpeting to the pontoon decking. We also get some information on SPX-Johnson bilge pumps and the ease of access they provide.
Video.title: Essentials - "Pontoon Deck Upgrade"

Video.summary: Good friend Mike Stone invites Willi to hunt his family ranch in Oklahoma. Good friend, Tom Petry goes along to film for his school, “Film The Hunt” and hopefully capture Willi shooting a good, Oklahoma buck.
Video.title: "The Stone Ranch"

Video.summary: Michael and Larken head to South Texas in search of trophy-sized trout. Along the way they make a pitstop to gear up and custom-build a Texas wading rod.
Video.title: "Double or Nothin'"

Video.summary: Host Ryan McVinney takes Boat Trader fans on an indepth exploration of Florida flats fishing deep in the backcountry of Islamorada. Featuring Captain Eric Lund, a Wall Street Broker turned backcountry fishing guide, this episode reveals the key design features of the world’s best flats skiffs and how they are built for targeting some of the most exciting sportfish species on the planet. Also, covered are bay boats and their versatility for families exploring Florida’s coastal waterways, along with a detailed study of fish species and wildlife in the region. Some of the area’s most beautiful and secret locales show why Islamorada has earned the nickname of the Sportfish Capital of The World.
Video.title: "Fishing Florida's Backcountry Wilderness"

Video.summary: After a long winter, Pete Osterman is eager to knock down his Minnesota gobbler with Josh Dahlke for their annual opening-week tradition. But like many turkey hunts, the POSSE gets the runaround at fly-down and end up grinding all day for an opportunity.
Video.title: "Dawn to Dusk Gobbler"

Video.summary: Mark Peterson is in the final stretch of completing the South America Upland Slam. Having already checked off nine species in Argentina, he now finds himself in Peru, where he faces the challenge of tracking down two elusive species to complete his list: the Andean Tinamou and the Western Peruvian Dove.
Video.title: "South America Upland Slam - Peru"

Video.summary: Join Mark Peterson as he heads to Kentucky for the late muzzleloader season. Already having an unforgettable season so far after taking “Freak Show” back in early September, he is looking to cap off his Kentucky season with a great buck with his Muzzleloader.
Video.title: "2024 Kentucky Late Muzzleloader Hunt"

Video.summary: C.A. joins Rhett Morris in Charlotte Harbor for an inshore slam adventure in one of Florida’s most productive estuaries.
Video.title: "Harbor Master"

Video.summary: On this episode of Fox Hollow Outdoors, Michael and Larken end their trip to Florida with an epic day of offshore fishing with Captain Chris Trosset.
Video.title: "Lucky Tuna"

Video.summary: Mark Scroggins and his family are in Oklahoma and spot a big gobbler from the road. They are pretty sure they can get in position to call him in but they have to be quick without being seen. His step-daughter Destiny is behind the trigger and Mark just about puts this ol gobbler in her lap!
Video.title: "HEART ATTACK TURKEY HUNT"

Video.summary: Jake Huebschman with The Hunting Public is in Iowa during the rut when he spots a mature buck locked down with a doe. Jake decides to get aggressive, closing the distance and mimicking an intruder buck to trigger a response. Watch as the plan unfolds in real time, showing how bold moves can pay off when hunting pressured whitetails.
Video.title: "Iowa Public Land Hunt"

Video.summary: Colten & Mark Scroggins is in Oklahoma during the peak rut, chasing mature whitetail bucks! With bucks on the move and searching for does, it's the perfect time to break out the calls. Watch as Mark and Colten pull out all the stops—getting aggressively loud with the WoodHaven "Intimidator" Grunt Call—to turn a cruising buck and bring him right into bow range at the blind.
Video.title: "Calling in a Rutting Buck"

Video.summary: Willi heads back to Ohio to hunt a lease with good friends, Nick, Tom and Jason. He had a unique hunt the previous year on a golf course. They didn’t lease the golf course this year, but it was the same group hunting a familiar piece of property.
Video.title: "Stickers In Ohio"

Video.summary: Welcome to spring gobbler season. Join us as Gavin heads to his home state of New York to chase gobblers on familiar ground with familiar faces.
Video.title: The - "Hunting With Dad OPENING DAY | NEW YORK Turkey Hunting"

Image.alt: The - "Hunting With Dad OPENING DAY | NEW YORK Turkey Hunting"
The - "Hunting With Dad OPENING DAY | NEW YORK Turkey Hunting"
The - "Hunting With Dad OPENING DAY | NEW YORK Turkey Hunting"
